The '''makant''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of large and playful [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] native to the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] who had the appearance of a cross between a cricket and a mantis. They were the domestic beast of the [[Gupin/Legends|Gupins]].

{{Species-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Disney+ subtitles for the episode incorrectly identify them as "mechants".

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Land of the Gupins}}
